manifest.name: DataCards

name: DataCards

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog 1.0.5

- **Refresh Button**: Added an option to disable the button
- **Refresh Button**: Implemented measures to prevent themes from interferring with the buttons styles.
- **NEW FEATURE:** Kanaban
- Use the Kanban preset to turn notes into Kanban boards
- customizable color coding and statuses
- create new Taks/notes directly from datacards plugins, with cusomizable task tempaltes and file path definiton

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog 1.0.4

- **Accent Color Integration**: Links and tags now automatically use your theme's accent color for better visual integration with Obsidian
- **Text Truncation Option**: Added optional setting to truncate long property values with ellipsis (...) for cleaner card layouts

- **Refresh Button**: Added manual refresh button to DataCards containers
    - Appears on hover in top-left corner
    - Works in both reading and editing modes
    - Visual feedback with rotation animation on click
    - Moved dynamic updates to "Advanced (Experimental)" section with warning about reliability. Using the Refresh Button is now the default and recommended option.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog 1.0.3

### Fixed

- **Fixed embedded wiki links**: Embedded wiki links with the `![[image.jpg]]` syntax now work correctly alongside the existing `[[image.jpg]]` format
- **Fixed Dynamic Columns settings hierarchy**: Per-block settings now properly override global settings
    - `columns: X` in code blocks now forces fixed columns even when Dynamic Columns is enabled globally
    - `dynamicColumns: true/false` in code blocks now overrides the global Dynamic Columns setting
    - `imageHeight` and other settings are no longer affected by the Dynamic Columns setting
- **Removed column limit**: Eliminated the hard cap of 6 columns
    - You can now use any number of columns (8, 10, 12, etc.)
    - Columns 1-6 still use optimized CSS classes for better performance
    - Higher column counts use CSS custom properties for unlimited flexibility

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Release version 1.0.2

- Add warning notes to task management examples about broken conditional formatting feature
- Fixed settings override hierarchy.
- fixed date formatting

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- external Links that only use the url are now rendered correctly as clickable links.
- fixed formatted text rendering
- updated documentation
- images from urls should work now more reliably

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog 1.0.1-beta.3

- Added mobileColumn settings.
	- Users can now define how many columns should be displayed on mobile devices (max. 3 columns)
	- Can be set globally in the settings menu or per codeblock 
- Added option to enable clickable cards, so that the whole card links to the corresponding note
- When a query is empty a message is shown to the user
- improved html rendering allowing for regex in dataview queries
- **Added configurable refresh delay**: You can now adjust how quickly DataCards updates after Meta Bind property changes through a new slider in settings (500ms-5000ms)
- **Improved update behavior**: Cards now update more reliably when properties are modified through Meta Bind components
- **Better typing experience**: Longer delay options available to prevent focus loss during extended typing sessions
- **Performance optimization**: Simplified update mechanism for smoother operation with Meta Bind
- added styling settings for checkboxes
releases.name: 1.0.0-beta.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: # Changelog - Updated README installation instructions (added BRAT-Plugin hint) ## Fixed Issues - **Dataview Query Compatibility** - Added support for the "as" operator in queries (`TABLE field as "Display Name"`) - Fixed handling of complex expressions with concatenation (`("![|60](" + cover +")") as Cover`) - Added support for markdown image syntax (`![]()`) in queries and property values - Backlinks are now displayed as clickable links - Using html formatting in properties now renders correctly like this: underlined, bold, and italic - Added dynamic property updates, when properties get changed via plugins like Meta Bind ## Improvements - **Enhanced Image Handling** - Improved loading of web-based images with multi-stage fallback system - Added proxy service fallback for images with CORS restrictions - Better error messages when images fail to load - Added Text / Title Alignment settings - Added Font Size Settings ## Technical Enhancements - Improved URL detection and extraction from various formats - Added robust error handling for image loading - Enhanced compatibility with different Dataview query formats
releases.name: 1.0.0-beta.2
